overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Odyssey showing a character approaching and entering the Temple of Apollo. The character walks through the monumental entrance, explores the interior with its massive columns and giant Apollo statue, observes a priest at the altar, and exits back to the exterior.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient Greek temple exterior with monumental steps

agents.ego_description: approaching the temple entrance up the stone steps toward the doric columns

entered.detail: monumental stone front with triangular pediment and decorative sculptures
massive fluted stone columns with simple capitals supporting the entablature
crimson banners with white symbols hanging from the temple facade
wide stone staircase leading up to the temple entrance
large dark doorway framed by columns leading into the temple interior

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the monumental Temple of Apollo from the exterior, showcasing the grand doric columns and purple banners hanging from the pediment. The character walks steadily up the stone steps toward the massive entrance doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple interior nave with colonnade and fire braziers

events.description: character enters the temple from the bright exterior into the dimly lit interior
lighting shifts from bright natural sunlight to dimmer interior with fire braziers

agents.ego_description: walking through the massive wooden doors into the temple's main hall

entered.detail: massive bronze-studded wooden doors opening into the temple
tall fluted columns with dark bases and gold bands lining the nave
intricate geometric patterned marble floor in red and gold tones
massive cult statue of Apollo visible at the far end of the hall
bronze fire holders with flames providing interior illumination

segments.scene_description: The character passes through the large wooden doors into the temple's interior, transitioning from bright sunlight to the dimmer, fire-lit nave. The camera moves down the long central aisle flanked by tall interior columns, with the massive Apollo statue visible at the far end of the hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple sanctuary approaching the cult statue and altar

events.description: camera tilts upward to look up at the massive Apollo statue

agents.ego_description: approaching the altar and looking up at the towering Apollo statue

notable_agents.action: priest standing at the altar with arms raised in prayer before the statue

entered.detail: stone altar with offerings at the base of the Apollo statue
decorated pedestal with carved reliefs supporting the massive statue

segments.scene_description: Approaching the sanctuary, the camera tilts upward to reveal the towering scale of the Apollo statue standing on its pedestal. A priest in blue robes becomes visible standing at the altar, performing rituals before the cult statue.

scene_state.functional_zone: altar area with offerings and ritual objects

events.description: camera circles around the altar to examine the offerings and lyre

agents.ego_description: circling the altar to observe the offerings, lyre, and the priest's ritual gestures

notable_agents.action: priest performing ritual gestures with arms raised toward the statue

entered.detail: ornate ceremonial lyre with curved arms placed on the altar
detailed relief carvings on the stone base depicting horses and figures
flowers, bowls, and ritual objects placed on the altar surface

segments.scene_description: The camera circles around the altar area, revealing detailed carvings on the statue base, a ceremonial lyre, and offerings. The priest continues his ritual gestures with arms raised toward the deity while the camera explores the ornate mosaic floor and wall decorations.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple nave returning to entrance and exit

events.description: character exits the temple back to the bright exterior
lighting changes from dim interior to bright natural sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking back down the nave and exiting the temple to the exterior

entered.detail: bright outdoor scene with cityscape visible through the entrance

segments.scene_description: The character turns and walks back down the nave toward the entrance, passing through the doorway and exiting back into the bright exterior. The transition reveals the cityscape visible from the temple steps as the camera leaves the sacred space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the bright exterior of the Temple of Apollo into its dim, sacred interior before returning back to the open cityscape. It begins by approaching the monumental stone steps and grand Doric columns adorned with purple banners, moving steadily toward the massive entrance. As the character passes through the wooden doors, the lighting shifts from brilliant sunlight to a fire-lit nave, where the camera glides down a long aisle of columns toward a towering statue of Apollo. The scene then expands within the sanctuary, tilting upward to reveal the deity's scale and circling a priest in blue robes performing rituals beside a ceremonial lyre and ornate mosaic floors. Finally, the camera turns and retreats back through the nave, transitioning from the shadowed hall back into the bright exterior light to reveal the surrounding city from the temple steps.
